text: Moving through these spaces, I am struck by the contrast: one environment buzzes with focused human interaction behind glass, the other radiates abstraction and thought, alive with color and words about research and development. I feel like an observer at the intersection of collaboration and curiosity. There is an air of anticipation—the promise of ideas coalescing. I feel a gentle awe, reminded of humanity’s ongoing quest to learn, connect, and shape the world consciously.
